Baby Gear

Best Baby Gear Deals 2025 — Save on Strollers, Car Seats & More

June 1, 2025 (Updated: June 10, 2025) #baby gear#strollers#car seats#nursery#discount codes

Bringing home a new baby comes with a long list of gear — and a hefty price tag. We’ve tracked down the best deals on baby essentials so you can save without sacrificing quality.

1. Amazon Baby Registry — 15% Completion Discount

Amazon’s baby registry comes with a 15% completion discount on thousands of eligible items.

Deal: 15% off remaining registry items

Start Your Baby Registry

Get 15% off remaining items. Free shipping on orders over $25.

Shop Amazon Baby →

2. Target Baby Registry — 15% Off

Target offers a 15% completion discount plus a welcome kit with samples and coupons worth over $100.

Deal: 15% off + free welcome kit

3. Buy Buy BABY — Up to 40% Off

One of the largest baby specialty retailers with frequent sales on strollers, car seats, and nursery furniture.

Deal: Up to 40% off select items

Quick Comparison

RetailerDiscountFree ShippingBest For
Amazon15% + Prime perks✅ Over $25Everything
Target15% + Welcome Kit✅ Over $35Essentials
Buy Buy BABYUp to 40%✅ Over $49Large items

Pro Tip

Start your baby registry early and add items as you go. The completion discount typically kicks in 60 days before your due date — giving you time to research and compare.
